Title: Tobidase uchû e! Kibô no hoshi wa Pikkoro no furusato
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: The battle with Vegeta is over--the survivors are picked up by Roshi, Bulma, Chichi and Karin, and everybody mourns their fallen friends. Also, Kuririn devises a plan to go to Namekku-sei to find their dragon balls and revive thei...
